condition: The part is a thick rounded base with curved ends and a real through opening rather than a surface mark. A raised annular cylindrical collar is added on the upper face, with its internal bore continuing into the stepped cut below instead of becoming solid at the base. Several removed circular features are present: small shallow side recesses and a separate shallow underside pattern of circular cuts. The underside and the collar bore use different depth tiers, so the lower continuation is stepped and does not simply match the full height of the raised collar.
note: Copied from local evaluated Text-to-CAD result; no evaluation was rerun.
